headline: Nexon and Electronic Arts Extend Publishing Partnership for FC Franchise in Korea
summary: TOKYO, May 15, 2026--NEXON Co., Ltd. (Nexon) (3659.TO), a global leader in online games, announced an agreement with Electronic Arts (EA) to extend their partnership for publishing the FC franchise in Korea. The long-term agreement secures the future of Korea’s most popular football franchise.
